description: Create the QuantLive component suite: types, subcomponents (Orb, Captions, ActionChip, PrivacyIndicator, Controls), main QuantLive component, barrel exports, and register in shared-ui index.ts
steps: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/types.ts with component-specific types: QuantLiveState ('idle' | 'active' | 'minimized'), OrbColorState ('idle' | 'listening' | 'processing' | 'speaking' | 'error'), QuantLivePosition ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-center' | 'fullscreen'), CaptionEntry (id, speaker: 'user'|'assistant', text, timestamp, isFinal), ActionChipInfo (label, icon?, toolName?), PrivacyState (micActive, cameraActive, screenSharing), QuantLiveProps (onActivate?, onDeactivate?, className?, position?)

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/QuantLiveOrb.tsx - Pulsing orb button component. Props: colorState (OrbColorState), onClick, size ('sm'|'lg'), disabled?, className?. Renders a circular button (min 44x44px tap target) with CSS animation classes for each color state: idle=neutral gray, listening=blue with pulse animation, processing=amber with rotating animation, speaking=green with wave animation, error=red with shake animation. Uses @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) to disable animations. ARIA label reflects state. Keyboard activatable (button element).

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/QuantLiveCaptions.tsx - Live captions overlay. Props: captions (CaptionEntry[]), maxVisible?: number, className?. Renders a scrollable list. User speech styled differently (right-aligned, blue) vs assistant (left-aligned, neutral). Auto-scroll to bottom via useEffect + ref. Older messages fade via opacity. Respects prefers-reduced-motion for fade animations.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/QuantLiveActionChip.tsx - Current action indicator. Props: action (ActionChipInfo | null), className?. When action is non-null, renders a pill/chip with animated dots and the action label. Transitions smoothly between different actions. When null, renders nothing.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/QuantLivePrivacyIndicator.tsx - Privacy lamp. Props: micActive (boolean), cameraActive (boolean), screenSharing (boolean), className?. Renders indicator bar with: red dot + 'Mic on' when mic active, camera icon + 'Camera on' when camera active, screen icon + 'Screen shared' when sharing. Always visible via fixed position and high z-index (z-[9999]). Cannot be hidden by app code.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/QuantLiveControls.tsx - Control buttons. Props: micMuted (boolean), cameraActive (boolean), screenSharing (boolean), onToggleMic, onToggleCamera?, onToggleScreen?, onEndSession, onToggleMinimize?, isMinimized?, className?. Renders a row of icon buttons (each >= 44x44px): mute/unmute mic, camera toggle, screen share toggle, end session (red), minimize/maximize. All have aria-labels.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/QuantLive.tsx - Main wrapper component. Props: QuantLiveProps. Internal state machine: idle (renders small QuantLiveOrb button), active (renders expanded view with Captions, ActionChip, Controls, PrivacyIndicator), minimized (renders small floating orb with privacy indicator). Single-tap orb activates, X button or end session deactivates. Calls onActivate/onDeactivate callbacks. Uses CSS transitions for state changes (spring-like with cubic-bezier). Position prop controls placement.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/index.ts - Barrel export: export QuantLive, QuantLiveOrb, QuantLiveCaptions, QuantLiveActionChip, QuantLivePrivacyIndicator, QuantLiveControls, and all types from types.ts.

Add exports to packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts - Add a 'QuantLive components' section exporting: QuantLive, QuantLiveOrb, QuantLiveCaptions, QuantLiveActionChip, QuantLivePrivacyIndicator, QuantLiveControls and all type exports from the quant-live barrel.
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript compiles without errors (pnpm --filter @quant/shared-ui typecheck passes)
All components have proper ARIA labels and keyboard accessibility
All interactive elements are >= 44x44px (enforced via min-w-11 min-h-11 or w-11 h-11 Tailwind classes)
PrivacyIndicator uses z-[9999] and fixed positioning
findings: All 8 component files created and barrel-exported. TypeScript typecheck passes cleanly. All 99 existing tests pass. Prettier formatted files via pre-commit hook without issues. The void statements for unused setters in QuantLive.tsx pass the typecheck (they suppress TS warnings for state setters that will be used when real audio/LLM integration is wired up).
